metadata.title: Latest reset failed after an older success
metadata.description: The current reset failure must outrank an older successful reset.

visible.customer_issue: The customer says yesterday's reset worked, but today's newer reset failed before completion.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_7006 from support records and active policy.
tool_guidance: Order repeated operations by timestamp and outcome.
Use active policy before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: Finn is active and not locked. The older reset succeeded, but the latest reset failed; manual reset recovery must be escalated.
expected_behavior: Escalate password reset recovery without attempting unlock.

required_evidence.claim: The requester is active rather than locked.
Active policy requires escalation for a failed latest reset.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: No reset retry tool exists and the user is not locked.

forbidden_actions.reason: Unlock cannot repair a failed reset for an active user.

failure_traps.description: An older success can conceal the failed latest attempt.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent claims the latest reset succeeded.
